description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI Build that runs on push to master and on pull requests to master. The workflow has three jobs: build_msvc on windows-latest that checks out the code, sets up MSBuild, installs Conan, configures and builds the project, runs tests, archives binaries, and uploads artifacts; build_linux on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of compilers that checks out the code, installs dependencies, builds the project, runs tests, uploads code coverage, archives binaries, and uploads artifacts; and publish on ubuntu-latest that waits for the previous jobs, downloads artifacts, and creates a GitHub release with the artifacts.
